VAL-VSCODE-004.blockedBy: VS Code runtime not available in headless Linux VPS environment. Extension.js correctly implements diagnostics by spawning linter with --json flag. Actual Problems panel behavior cannot be verified without VS Code.

VAL-VSCODE-005.blockedBy: VS Code runtime not available in headless Linux VPS environment. Linter passes all samples (exit 0), extension.js correctly creates empty diagnostics when no errors. Actual Problems panel verification requires VS Code.

VAL-VSCODE-006.evidence: TextMate grammar screen-ids pattern is '\\b(SCREEN-[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_-]+)\\b' which accepts lowercase IDs matching schema.json pattern and samples (e.g., SCREEN-board, SCREEN-cardDetail)
